diffpepdock_results.gpu_vram_peak_estimated_mb: N/A (peak not captured; GPU idle before/after)
diffpepdock_results.openmm_issue: libstdc++.so.6 GLIBCXX_3.4.30 not found — amber/rosetta relaxation unavailable

inter_pose_rmsd.description: Aligned Cα RMSD (pose_001~009 vs pose_000 as reference)
inter_pose_rmsd.note: No crystal complex available for SSTR2+SST14 (14aa linear form). Inter-pose RMSD measures pose diversity only, NOT accuracy vs. ground truth.

engines.output_score: pose coordinates only (no confidence score in v1)

diffpepdock_pros: Peptide-specific diffusion model (trained on PepPC-F dataset)
Multi-pose generation in single inference pass
Faster than Boltz for pure peptide docking (no MSA required)
diffpepdock_cons: No SS bond (disulfide) support — SST14 Cys3-Cys14 ring NOT modeled
No confidence/affinity score output (v1) — cannot rank poses by binding strength
openmm GLIBCXX incompatibility blocks Amber/Rosetta relaxation postprocessing
Trained primarily on linear peptides; cyclic/constrained peptides out-of-distribution
Requires separate RMSD scoring vs. crystal reference for validation
pros_cons.sstr2_specific_concern: SST14 is a cyclic peptide via Cys3-Cys14 disulfide bond. DiffPepDock v1 accepts linear amino acid sequences only. The disulfide constraint is structurally critical for FWKT pharmacophore presentation. Running DiffPepDock on linearized SST14 generates geometrically inconsistent poses.

reason: Critical: SS bond (Cys3-Cys14) not supported — produces wrong ring conformation
No affinity/confidence score → cannot rank candidates → useless as a scoring engine
openmm GLIBCXX issue blocks postprocessing (env-level fix required)
Inter-pose RMSD 0.36~2.26 Å shows reasonable pose diversity but without ground truth cannot assess accuracy
alternative: Boltz: already integrated, supports SS bond via CCD, ipTM score available
FlexPepDock: supports DisulfideBondMover, ddG score available, already integrated
DiffPepDock future work: v2 with cyclic peptide support or SMILES input could enable re-evaluation
recommendation.gate_criteria: RMSD ≤ 2.0 Å success rate ≥ 80% vs. crystal reference (N/A: no SSTR2+SST14-14aa crystal structure available)

nvidia_smi_snapshot.note: Peak VRAM during inference not captured (run completed before snapshot). Estimated ~2-4 GB based on 1.2 GB checkpoint + activations.
